author: Fabien Motte
subject: refactor(css): refactor autocomplete to use common css vars (#6814)
body:
* refactor(css): refactor autocomplete to use css vars

* fix: devtools export

* fix: styles

* feat: add support for other dimensions

* fix: bundlesize

* fix: disable auto dark mode for now

* test: fix

* feat: add dark class support

* fix: autocomplete color item hover

* refactor: remove font-family css var

* refactor: align icons naming

* fix: use `ais-icon-size` css var for chat/button components

* fix: color mix

* test: fix

* chore: better name for IS.css devtools and error message

* fix: unitless for instantsearch.css devtools

* fix: autocomplete bg color opacity

* fix: should not append unitless

---------

Co-authored-by: Haroen Viaene <hello@haroen.me>
